name: Make typed composition real
intent: Enforce the agent input schema contracts that currently exist as decorative annotations, and demonstrate template composition across multiple agent families — converting the typed composition advantage from aspirational to functional. (pre-FGAP-026 planning artifact)

success_criteria.criterion: executeAgentStep validates input against AgentSpec.inputSchema before dispatch
All existing workflow specs pass input schema validation without error
At least 3 template families use Nunjucks extends/block composition (up from 1)
At least one reusable agent accepts variable input shapes via optional fields with conditional template rendering

specs.name: Enforce agent input schema validation
specs.intent: Add schema validation in executeAgentStep so typed contracts are real

specs.name: Fix workflow specs for schema compliance
specs.intent: Ensure every agent invocation in existing workflows satisfies the agent's input schema

specs.name: Expand template inheritance to more agent families
specs.intent: Prove composition model works beyond the single analyzer family

specs.name: Redesign reusable agents with parametric input
specs.intent: Transform structural repetition into genuine parametric recombination
